title: centaurea amara var. serotina
intro: Centaurea amara var. serotina, also known as knapweed or bitter knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea, indigestion, and irritable bowel syndrome due to its bitter and astringent compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea amara var. serotina include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help in wound healing and reducing fever. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to support liver and kidney function.
